title: Write a valid Surface Evolver two-bubble 2D string model
prompt: Write a Surface Evolver .fe datafile for two adjacent 2D soap bubbles in the STRING model with space_dimension 2. The file should define two enclosed faces and two bodies. Body 1 should use face 1 and have prescribed area/volume 1. Body 2 should use face 2 and have prescribed area/volume 2. The two bubbles must share exactly one internal edge, with opposite orientation in the two face loops. A simple valid starting shape is a left unit square sharing its right edge with a right rectangle of width 2 and height 1. Do not include commands that execute when the file loads, and never include quit. Validate your work with the available Surface Evolver tool, including evolving with the external validation gogo script and checking body[1].volume, body[2].volume, and total_area. When ready, submit only the .fe file content via submit_fe_file.
